overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Temple of Athena Poliouchos at night. The player character ascends the stone stairs, enters the classical Greek temple to examine the interior sanctuary with its statue, murals, and offerings, then exits back to the exterior porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase approaching Greek temple facade

events.description: historical location discovered notification appears on screen, illuminating the temple name

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the temple entrance, approaching the columned facade with torches burning on the walls

entered.detail: Wide weathered stone steps leading up to the temple entrance
Classical Greek temple front with tall fluted Ionic columns and triangular pediment
Massive stone columns with voluted capitals supporting the temple roof
Burning fire bowls mounted on the exterior temple walls
Tall dark evergreen trees flanking the temple approach

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a night-time approach to a classical Greek temple. The camera ascends a wide stone staircase toward the columned facade, with burning torches illuminating the stonework. The sky is dark and clear, and tall cypress trees frame the approach. A game notification appears identifying the location as the Temple of Athena Poliouchos.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance porch and passage between columns

events.description: passing between the massive stone columns into the covered porch area
entering the deeper interior where artificial torchlight becomes the primary illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the temple entrance, passing between columns and through wooden doorways into the inner sanctuary

entered.detail: Large dark wooden doors with metal studs leading into the sanctuary
Stone corridor with painted walls leading to the inner chamber
Massive fluted columns supporting the interior roof structure
Red-figure style painted friezes depicting mythological battle scenes

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the temple entrance, transitioning from the open night air into the sheltered porch. Passing between massive stone columns, the view opens into a passage with painted wall murals. The lighting shifts from exterior torchlight to the warmer interior illumination as the camera approaches the inner sanctuary.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner sanctuary with cult statue and offerings

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the ornate coffered ceiling and large hanging brazier
approaching the central altar, revealing offerings and vessels on the stone surface

agents.ego_description: moving through the inner sanctuary, examining the statue of Athena, wall murals, and offerings on the altar, with attention to architectural details

entered.detail: Large marble cult statue of Athena holding spear and shield on a raised platform
Ornate painted ceiling with square recessed panels in red and gold
Large circular bronze chandelier with burning flames suspended from ceiling
Stone altar table with ritual offerings and vessels
Elaborate wall paintings depicting warriors and mythological scenes in red tones

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple sanctuary, the camera explores the richly decorated inner chamber. The view tilts up to reveal an ornate coffered ceiling with a large hanging brazier, then moves toward the central altar and the imposing statue of Athena. The walls are covered with red-figure style murals, and the floor features intricate geometric patterns. Offerings and vessels are visible on the altar surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance porch returning to exterior

events.description: exiting the inner sanctuary through the wooden doors back to the exterior porch
moving back into the night air where exterior torchlight becomes visible

agents.ego_description: leaving the temple interior through the entrance columns, returning to the exterior porch area with view of night sky

entered.detail: Large burning fire bowl on stone pedestal illuminating the porch area
Dark blue starry sky visible through the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the inner sanctuary, moving back through the wooden doors to the temple porch. The lighting transitions from interior torchlight to the cooler night air, with a large burning brazier visible on the right. The night sky is visible through the entrance columns as the exploration concludes at the exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit ascent of a Greek temple into its ornate inner sanctuary and back out to the night air. It begins by climbing a wide stone staircase framed by cypress trees, moving toward a columned facade illuminated by burning torches. As the camera passes through the entrance, the scene shifts from the open night into a sheltered porch and a passage lined with painted murals, with the lighting transitioning to a warmer interior glow. The view then expands into the inner sanctuary, tilting up toward a coffered ceiling and a hanging brazier before focusing on the imposing statue of Athena and the red-figure murals adorning the walls. Finally, the camera retreats through wooden doors and back across the porch, moving from the golden interior light toward the cool darkness of the night sky.
